summary: Replayed ADR 0295 from the synchronized mainline worktree by converging the governed build-artifact-cache wrapper on docker-build-lv3, keeping the documented ADR 0191 narrow in-place exception explicit, serving the shared pull-through mirrors on 10.10.10.30:5001-5004, warming the current repo-derived 41-image seed set, and re-verifying both the BuildKit mirror path and apt-cacher-ng afterward.

verification.check: Focused artifact-cache regression coverage on the synchronized branch head
verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest python -m pytest -q tests/test_artifact_cache_runtime_role.py tests/test_service_id_resolver.py` returned `6 passed in 0.45s` after the host-network artifact-cache mirror change and the `build-artifact-cache` to `docker_build` execution-scope alias were both carried forward onto the merged head.

verification.check: Artifact-cache playbook syntax and guard chain on the synchronized worktree
verification.observed: `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/ansible_scope_runner.py run --inventory inventory/hosts.yml --run-id ws0295syntax2 --playbook playbooks/services/build-artifact-cache.yml --env production -- --private-key .local/ssh/hetzner_llm_agents_ed25519 -e proxmox_guest_ssh_connection_mode=proxmox_host_jump --syntax-check` passed, `standby_capacity.py --service build-artifact-cache` returned `Decision: approved`, `service_redundancy.py --check-live-apply --service build-artifact-cache` reported the expected `docker_build: declared R1 -> platform R1 -> implemented R0 [gate=unproven]`, and `immutable_guest_replacement.py --check-live-apply --service build-artifact-cache --allow-in-place-mutation` recorded the governed ADR 0191 override for docker-build-lv3.

`ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true make live-apply-service service=build-artifact-cache env=production EXTRA_ARGS='-e bypass_promotion=true'` succeeded from synchronized commit `b80cc3a886539bb467a7ed54b2e606180cd08f44` with final recap `docker-build-lv3 : ok=103 changed=9 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=7 rescued=0 ignored=0`.

verification.check: Live artifact-cache mirrors and build path verification after exact-main replay
verification.observed: Post-apply SSH verification on `docker-build-lv3` confirmed `PORT:5001 ok`, `PORT:5002 ok`, `PORT:5003 ok`, and `PORT:5004 ok`; `docker ps` listed `artifact-cache-docker-hub`, `artifact-cache-ghcr`, `artifact-cache-n8n`, and `artifact-cache-plane`; `jq '.seed_images | length' /opt/artifact-cache/seed-plan.json` returned `41`; `docker buildx inspect lv3-cache --bootstrap` succeeded; `systemctl is-active lv3-buildkitd` returned `active`; and `curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:3142/acng-report.html` succeeded.

notes: This receipt is the canonical exact-main live-apply proof for ADR 0295 and justifies the platform version bump to 0.130.59 while repository version 0.177.86 stays unchanged.

The replay intentionally used `ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true` as the documented ADR 0191 narrow exception for the governed docker-build-lv3 guest; immutable replacement remains the preferred delivery model for future changes on that lane.

The first branch-local replay on the older workstream head exposed a real runtime defect: registry mirrors running on Docker bridge networking failed upstream DNS lookups against `127.0.0.11`. This workstream corrected the artifact-cache containers to run on host networking before the synchronized exact-main replay.
The repo-derived warm set grew from the earlier branch-local `40` images to `41` images on the synchronized mainline because current repo catalogs now include the `matrixdotorg/synapse` image.
